$comment: Default-deny egress template. Entrypoint renders this from scope.egress_allowlist into iptables/nftables. Only the Anthropic API endpoint is always permitted. The cloud metadata endpoint (169.254.169.254) is deliberately NOT allow-listed: the agent's tools must never reach IMDS, or an SSRF/redirect could exfiltrate the harness's workload-role credentials. boto3/KMS obtain credentials via the workload role on a path the agent's HTTP tools cannot use (e.g. a separate network namespace or a credential sidecar); if IMDS access is unavoidable, require IMDSv2 with hop-limit 1.
